purpose: Measure whether an explicit source-claim decision rule raises condition-blind inter-judge reliability without changing arms, answers, mappings, or prior outcomes.
decision_rule: Prefer an answer with no blocking source-contradicted claim over an answer with any such claim.
When blocking-claim status is equal, prefer higher correctness.
When correctness is equal, prefer higher change usefulness.
Return tie only when all three comparisons are equal.
reporting: Preserve protocol-v8 as the uncalibrated round. Report v9 separately and do not replace, rescore, or hide the prior disagreement.
